name: Service Level Agreement
text: The Service Provider shall meet the service levels specified in Schedule 2 ('Service Levels'). In the event that the Service Provider fails to meet any Service Level in a given calendar month, the Client shall be entitled to service credits as specified in Schedule 2. Service credits shall be the Client's sole and exclusive remedy for Service Level failures, unless such failure constitutes a material breach of this Agreement. The Service Provider shall provide the Client with monthly reports detailing Service Level performance within five (5) Business Days after the end of each calendar month. The Client shall raise service credit claims within fifteen (15) days of receiving the monthly report. Service credits shall be applied against the next payable invoice.

legal_basis.note: Service credits as pre-estimate of loss from SLA failure

invalid_if: Service credit cap below reasonable estimate of loss making it an unenforceable penalty clause
Service levels not defined in a Schedule making the SLA unenforceable for uncertainty
title: Service Level Agreement
dispute_hotspots: Uptime measurement — client and vendor have different uptime data
Credits as sole remedy — client claims credits insufficient for catastrophic outage
